queries.question: List all lobbies or terraces that can accomodate 500 people.
queries.sql:
SELECT Room.Name 
FROM Room
WHERE (Room.Indoor_Outdoor_Space = "Lobby" OR Room.Indoor_Outdoor_Space = "Terrace") AND Room.Size = 500
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?room a :Rooms .
  ?room p:name ?name .
  ?room p:Indoor_Outdoor_Space ?indoor_outdoor_space_w .
  ?room p:Indoor_Outdoor_Space ?indoor_outdoor_space_w2 .
  ?room p:Size ?size_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?indoor_outdoor_space_w) = "Lobby" || STR(?indoor_outdoor_space_w2) = "Terrace")) && (STR(?size_w) = "500" || STR(?size_w) = "500.0")))
}
